title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.436 - Rules, regulations, promulgation, procedure
text:
198.436.  Rules, regulations, promulgation, procedure. — No regulations implementing sections 198.401 to 198.436 may be filed with the secretary of state without first being provided to interested parties registered on a list of such parties to be maintained by the director of the department of social services.  Regulations must be provided to all interested parties seventy-two hours prior to being filed with the secretary of state.  No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 198.401 to 198.436 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1362 § 13, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 198.439
